body_txt: The number seven is considered lucky or is associated with good fortune. In East Asian cultures, the number eight also fills the same role. A Subtrope of Rule of Seven . See also Numerological Motif , Magical Seventh Son , and Magnificent Seven . Compare Mystical 108 . Contrast 13 Is Unlucky and, in Asia, Four Is Death . Notably, seven is the most likely number to get if you roll two dice, making it significant in gambling.
